← Ontology

Traditional_Ecological_Knowledge

Parent item
33314415-10e1-8167-8e0e-d1ba6203b515
long_description
Indigenous and place-based knowledge systems encode long observation, ethical relation, and continuity with land and water. Upholding and applying them is not nostalgia; it is recognizing forms of intelligence without which regeneration and cultural survival are incomplete.
slug
Traditional_Ecological_Knowledge
Activities
33314415-10e1-81b8-84d5-f44c2c3a44ec, 33314415-10e1-814f-830d-cd24c8cadad4, 33314415-10e1-8162-af49-d467c9cb9a89, 33314415-10e1-81f3-8a84-fa35937a1065, 33314415-10e1-8164-aaf3-c3e5ec59afd4, 33314415-10e1-81e5-bbce-d6ac8c343727, 33314415-10e1-816c-ba20-fd58db6ba1ee, 33314415-10e1-81e4-9ba3-f33b9df57eee, 33314415-10e1-812e-a224-eaf8da501cf2, 33314415-10e1-8171-a60a-cd337305d804, 33314415-10e1-8132-a2b4-c559b9cfeebc, 33314415-10e1-8190-b896-e293d6563720, 33314415-10e1-816b-8501-e729f39a7fc3, 33314415-10e1-8184-b00f-f4351e9bc57e, 33314415-10e1-8139-95b3-d391e432ca80, 33314415-10e1-813e-8c8b-d0a3943fccc7, 33314415-10e1-8118-8c66-f59f674e5ae7, 33314415-10e1-8122-99cb-c36f6096cc2a, 33314415-10e1-81aa-ac7c-fc89a3844272
Description
Initiatives that revitalize, apply, or uphold Indigenous and place-based knowledge systems as essential tools for ecological regeneration, cultural continuity, and bioregional stewardship.
parent_pattern_name
Ways of Knowing
